name: fit4110-lab04-camera-packaging
description: FIT4110 Lab 04 - camera-stream Docker packaging and Newman verification for Smart Campus services

scripts.test:camera:mock: npx -y newman@6.2.1 run postman/collections/FIT4110_lab04_camera_docker.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/FIT4110_lab04_camera_mock.postman_environment.json -r cli,junit,htmlextra --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-lab04-mock.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-lab04-mock.html
scripts.test:camera:local: npx -y newman@6.2.1 run postman/collections/FIT4110_lab04_camera_docker.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/FIT4110_lab04_camera_local.postman_environment.json -r cli,junit,htmlextra --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-lab04-local.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-lab04-local.html
